message:
feat(engine): add floating-point deterministic replay infrastructure

- Add FloatingPointResult nondeterminism source for cross-architecture
  FP reproducibility
- Implement capture_fp_result() and replay_fp_result() methods for
  recording and replaying float operation results during execution
- Add encode_fp_for_trace() and decode_fp_from_trace() helpers for
  serializing f64 values as raw u64 bits in trace format
- Add ULP-based divergence classification that categorizes cross-platform
  FP differences by magnitude (exact match, 1-ULP, small, large divergence)
- Comprehensive test coverage for NaN bit patterns, subnormals, infinities,
  encode/decode round-trip, and ULP distance calculation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
